subject: two mismatched creatures side by side — a small green goblin-like figure sitting contemplatively, and a large leonine figure wielding a heavy flail
description: Two very different creatures are presented side by side in a contrasting composition. On the left, a small squat green goblin-like creature with a mane of wild feathers or fur sits on a stone pedestal, in a posture of calm thought — head tilted, body still. On the right, a large, muscular leonine or sphinx-like creature with a long bristling mane stands upright, gripping a heavy spiked flail or morningstar weapon in an aggressive stance. The flavor text implies their personalities have been swapped. The background is pale and foggy.
foreground: small goblin in contemplation on pedestal; large leonine creature with flail
emotion: comic incongruity — the brute in repose, the thinker gone feral
